titleStmt.title: SII 22.71: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 71. (A.R. No. 71 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. BĀJARĀJA (I)—26th YEAR (A.D. 1010-11)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Tirumagaḷpōla etc. It is built in at the begining of each line. It records the sale of some land tax-free by the assembly of Maṟuvūr alias Vayiramēgha-Chaturvēdimaṅgalam on the southern bank of the river in Vāṇagappāḍi to the temple of Tāṉṟōṉṟi-Mahādēva at Vāḷaiyūr (Jambai) alias Nittavinōdapuram on the northern bank, to provide for offerings to god Kshētrapāla dēva in the temple. The cost of the land and the lump-sum amount towards the payment of taxes (iṟai-dravyam) seems to have been received by the sabhā from a certain Kāḍagachchōmāśi of Kūvaṇḍūr, a member of the āḷum-gaṇam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyun taṭikai pāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaḻtara yiḻamaṇṭalamu miraṭṭapāṭi yeḻarai yilakkamunti
ṇṭe ceḻinarait tecukoḷ śrī kovirājarāja rājakesari panmarāna śrīrājarājadevaṟkiyāṇṭu 2 10 6Āvatu . vāṇakoppāṭi peṇṇait teṉkaraiy maṟuvūrākiya vayirameka ścaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Innāṭṭu peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāḷaiyūrākiya nittavinotapurattu tiruttāṉṟoṉṟi mahādevar koyilil kṣettirapāla tevaṟkkut tiruvamutukku
sabhaiyom viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvū riyāḷuṅ kaṇattāruḷ kūvaṇṭūr kāṭakaccomāci cavainokkāka viṭṭa pūmi teṉkāṟṟalaip pāṭakattu kiḻpāṟkellai koṭṭūr mātevaṭikaḷ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai teṟkil kālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Iḻumpūr kan=tarvva nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai naṭuviṟperuṅkālukku teṟku minnāṟ
ṉ māvumāka muṉṟu mānilattukku memmilicain=ta vilai tra (ra)vyamu miṟaitravyamum poruḷaṟa koṇṭu Inilattāl van=ta Iṟai Epperpaṭṭatu miṟaiyiḻicci sabhai mele yeṟṟi kṣetrapālatevaṟku viṟṟukkuṭutto maṟuvūrākiya vayirameka caturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 22.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
